author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: feat(indexId): avoid to rely on the results.index  [PART-1] (algolia/react-instantsearch#1833)
body:
* feat(indexId): rely on indexId rather than indexName [PART-2] (algolia/react-instantsearch#1835)

* feat(indexId): refactor createInstantSearchManager [PART-3] (algolia/react-instantsearch#1840)

* feat(indexId): rely on indexId rather than indexName in SSR [PART-4] (algolia/react-instantsearch#1842)

* feat(indexId): refactor createInstantSearchServer [PART-5] (algolia/react-instantsearch#1843)

* feat(indexId): rename getIndex -> getIndexId [PART-6] (algolia/react-instantsearch#1851)
